title: Disable chunked upload bodies for SeaweedFS release artifacts

source.subject: ci: avoid chunked body for SeaweedFS uploads

body:
Disables **chunked upload bodies** that SeaweedFS mishandles for release artifacts.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `compiler`
- **Commit:** [`81406de`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/compiler/commit/81406de)
- **Subject:** ci: avoid chunked body for SeaweedFS uploads
- **Completed:** 2026-04-22

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.1 (Compiler foundation)
- **Workstream:** `ci-release`

## Relation
Storage-backend-specific fix in **ci-release**.
